title: 8 Marks of a Man God Is Quietly Building Through His Work
caption:
None of these show up on a resume. Here are 8 marks of a man God is quietly building through his work:

1. He shows up on the day nobody's checking. Consistency is the whole test now.
2. He finishes the task he already knows won't be seen.
3. He does the small job well before he asks for the bigger one. Faithful in little, trusted with much.
4. He works like the review is coming from higher up. Whatever you do, work at it as for the Lord. (Colossians 3:23)
5. He stays useful past the point it stopped being fun.
6. He lets the boring season build what the exciting one can't.
7. He does the work before he needs the credit.
8. He treats Monday like it matters to God, not just to his boss. Ordinary obedience is still obedience.

Save this and look at which one you're actually being built in right now.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #work #character
